description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On October 4, 2025 at 4:38 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a collision 
involving a low clearance bar in a parking lot at 1980 W. Reservoir Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling northbound in a parking lot at 1980 W. Reservoir Street in manual mode. The test driver proceeded forward 
underneath a covered driveway, and the sensor mounted on the roof of the Waymo AV made contact with the low clearance bar hanging 
from the ceiling of the covered driveway. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was not engaged and a test driver was 
operating the Waymo AV in manual mode. The Waymo AV sustained damage. 
 
Print
Clear Form
